## Brand Rule Reminder

Please review your changes for brand compliance before requesting review:

- Do not use em dashes. Use commas, parentheses, or restructured sentences instead.
- Do not use the terms "Web3" or "Web2". Use specific terms such as "crypto", "onchain", "blockchain", "DeFi", "DePIN", "Agentic Finance", or "standard system" as appropriate.
- Use official capitalization for proper nouns (e.g., Prime Beat, SMBC日興証券).
- Do not use historical analogies or monetary-history metaphors in public-facing copy.
- Do not name competitors in external materials.
